scope: TeacherProfiles collection with systemPrompt relationship to Prompts
Chat orchestrator integration for profile injection
Frontend UI for profile selection and display
assumptions: Prompts collection already exists in the codebase
UserSettings collection exists and can be modified
Chat orchestrator exists and can be extended
Default Teacher Profile can be configured at system level

input_quality.reasoning: Input contains complete Data Model section with collection fields, Chat Orchestrator Integration with detailed Step 1/Step 2 instructions, Runtime Behavior, Default Strategy, UI Behavior, and 9 explicit Acceptance Criteria. Implementation steps are specified including system prompt order, relationship requirements, and exclusion rules for memory/vector pipelines.
